title: LevelsSMP Remake
description: Remakes the Original Levels SMP Concept into a public plugin.
body:
**Have you ever seen a Levels SMP video and thought to yourself; Hey! I wanna play on a similar server? NOW YOU CAN!! 🔥**
# 🔰 Levels SMP Remake 🔰 
**Revives the old Levels SMP Plugin for a public free-use one for people to use for there custom worlds or servers!**
# HOW IT WORKS: 
**It is a XP Multiplier system where you spawn in with 1.0x multipliers and each multiplier determines the BOOST🐦‍🔥 you get when collecting experience orbs!**

**When losing / gaining multipliers from 1.0x to 0.1x you will get 1 per until you reach 1.0x which afterwards each multiplier gained is .5x going all the way up to 5.0x! 🤩**

**Players on 1.5x multipliers and below can craft a multiplier with the default recipe or the admin can change it through the Config.YML file! (base recipe in gallery)** 

**When dying on 0.1x multipliers you get DEATH BANNED and you cannot rejoin until someone crafts a Revive Beacon which spawns you back on .4x multipliers 🤕 (base recipe in gallery)**
